titleStmt.title: SII 17.457: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 457. (A.R. No. 426 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz., Makara, śu. 13, Wednesday correspond to 1198 A.D., January 22, Thursday (not Wednesday), f.d.t. ·96.

This inscription records the gift of 50 sheep for a perpetual lamp to the god Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-Uḍaiyār of Kuṉṟūr-nāḍu in Umbaḷa-nāḍu, by Māmbāṟ-kiḻān Irāśarāśa Araiya[ṉ]••••• , of Pottūr in Kākkalūr-nāḍu in [Īkk]āṭṭu-kōṭṭam, in Jayaṅg[oṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam].

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyum keThe right end of the inscription is built in.
tevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu trayodaśiyum putan kiḻamai
Umpaḷaṉāṭṭu kuṉṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyāṟku jayaṅke
kāṭṭuk koṭṭattu kākkalūr ṉāṭṭu pottūr māmpāṟkiḻān Irācarāca Araiya
yan cantiṟātittavaṟ cella Upaiyamāka vaitta tirunun=tāviḷakku
kuttiruviḷakkuney Aḷakkum Iṭaiyaril mātantevanāna tiruvuṉā
nāna cittirameḻikonum mātanampiyaāna cirāma tevakkonum mātan
m Innālvom kaikkoṇṭa Āṭu 5 10 Ivvāṭu Aiñpatum kaikkoṇṭu Irā
yaka nāḻiyāl Uḻakkāka van=taney muṟaiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇar pakkale
kaḷ vaṅśattāre Aḷakkak kaṭavatānamaikku pa
Digital edition of SII 17.457 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
